---
title: "Episodes"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "episode-*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [title, date, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    categories: "Topics"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .cou-section-title {
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
    border-bottom: 3px solid #f0c040;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  #listing-episodes .card {
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }
  #listing-episodes .card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
    border-color: #f0c040;
  }
  #listing-episodes .card-title a {
    color: #1a1a1a;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
</style>
```

All episodes from **The Corridor of Uncertainty** — a podcast at the intersection of maths & sport, hosted by Dr Jess Hargreaves & Dr Rich Bingham at the University of York.

[⬅️ Back to Corridor Home](../index.html)
